title: Python Testing Frameworks Comparison
description: Research comparison of pytest, unittest, and nose2 with strengths, weaknesses, and recommendation matrix

frameworks_compared.name: pytest
frameworks_compared.verdict: Best for new projects and modern CI/CD

frameworks_compared.name: unittest
frameworks_compared.verdict: Best for zero-dependency and regulated environments

frameworks_compared.name: nose2
frameworks_compared.verdict: Best for migrating legacy nose test suites
